_meta.description: Compliance symbol for free cooling status. Shows checkmark if no mechanical cooling required (m_124 = 0 days), warning symbol if mechanical cooling is needed.

inputs.name: cooling.daysActiveCooling
inputs.description: Number of days requiring mechanical cooling (m_124)

behavior.note: No mechanical cooling needed - building achieves free cooling
Mechanical cooling required - not achieving full free cooling

rationale.whyWarningNotFail: Some climates and building types genuinely require mechanical cooling. This is informational (⚠) rather than a hard failure (✗), unlike the efficiency-based compliance metrics.

tests.name: Negative value (oversized ventilation)
tests.note: Negative days means free cooling exceeds demand
